tool_args.label: Station Re-NEW-vation Program
tool_args.raw_text: 52 Station Re-NEW-vations

payload.description: Station upgrade program completing 52 stations with 61 targeted by end of 2023

tool_args.label: 50th Station Re-NEW-vation at Junction Blvd
tool_args.raw_text: On October 12, New York City Transit completed structural and cosmetic renovations at Junction Boulevard 7 in Corona, Queens, delivering on its commitment to complete 50 Station Re-NEW-vations by the end of 2023.

payload.description: NYCT completed structural and cosmetic renovations at Junction Boulevard 7 station, reaching 50th Station Re-NEW-vation

tool_args.label: Post-pandemic subway ridership high on Sep 20
tool_args.raw_text: September 20th, the subway carried a post-pandemic high of 4.18 million customers.

payload.description: Subway carried a post-pandemic high of 4.18 million customers

tool_args.label: AAR Ford E-450 van demonstration
tool_args.raw_text: On October 10, AAR demonstrated a new van model which will join AAR fleet – the Ford E-450.

payload.description: Access-A-Ride demonstrated new Ford E-450 van model at Brooklyn Museum

tool_args.label: Historic rainfall from Tropical Storm Ophelia
tool_args.raw_text: On Friday, September 29, New York City and the Tri-State region experienced historic rainfall from the remnants of Tropical Storm Ophelia – with enormous impact to subway operations affecting millions of customers.

payload.description: Historic rainfall from remnants of Tropical Storm Ophelia with enormous impact to subway operations

tool_args.label: Climate Week NYC and Grand Avenue Depot tour
tool_args.raw_text: In celebration of Climate Week, Buses SVP Frank Annicaro toured the Grand Avenue Depot and Central Maintenance Facility in Queens with Justin E. Driscoll, President & CEO of NYPA

payload.event_name: Grand Avenue Depot tour during Climate Week
payload.description: Buses SVP Frank Annicaro toured Grand Avenue Depot and Central Maintenance Facility in Queens with Justin E. Driscoll of NYPA to announce construction for Phase I of charging infrastructure project

tool_args.label: Subway satisfaction September 2023
tool_args.raw_text: In September 2023, 58% of customers were satisfied with subway service

tool_args.label: Customer Journey Time Performance Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Customer Journey Time Performance (CJTP), or riders reaching their destinations within 5 minutes of schedule, was 84.4% - the 20th straight month above the Department of Subways goal (83.5%)

payload.description: riders reaching their destinations within 5 minutes of schedule

tool_args.label: Weekday On-Time Performance Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Weekday On-Time Performance (OTP) was 79.6%

tool_args.label: Weekend On-Time Performance Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Weekend OTP was 84.8% which well exceeds both our 2023 goal and historical averages

tool_args.label: Additional Platform Time Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Additional Platform Time (APT) did take a hit at 74 seconds which is 14 seconds lower than the prior month.

tool_args.label: Post-pandemic high ridership Sep 20 2023
tool_args.raw_text: September 20th, the subway carried a post-pandemic high of 4.18 million customers.

tool_args.label: Paid weekday subway ridership Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: September paid weekday subway ridership rebounded as expected to 3.72 million.

tool_args.label: Paid weekday bus ridership Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Paid weekday bus ridership came was 1.38 million.

tool_args.label: Subway Service Delivered Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Sep 2023: 93.5% Service Delivered

tool_args.label: Bus satisfaction Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Overall bus satisfaction was 59%

tool_args.label: Bus CJTP Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: CJTP decreased 1.8% this month to 68%

tool_args.label: Bus service delivered Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Service Delivered was 94.6%

tool_args.label: AAR satisfaction August 2023
tool_args.raw_text: 74% and 73% of AAR customers were satisfied with service in August and September

tool_args.label: AAR satisfaction September 2023
tool_args.raw_text: 73% of AAR customers were satisfied with service in September

tool_args.label: 52 Re-NEW-vated stations completed
tool_args.raw_text: We've now Re-NEW-vated 52 stations and are on track to complete 61 by the end of the year.

payload.claim_text: We've now Re-NEW-vated 52 stations and are on track to complete 61 by the end of the year.

tool_args.label: R211S first new Staten Island Railway rolling stock in 5 decades
tool_args.raw_text: We were also thrilled to announce the upcoming deployment of the R211S model on the Staten Island Railway – the first new rolling stock there in five decades!

payload.claim_text: We were also thrilled to announce the upcoming deployment of the R211S model on the Staten Island Railway – the first new rolling stock there in five decades!
payload.description: New rolling stock for Staten Island Railway

tool_args.label: Purchase of 250 over-the-road express diesel buses
tool_args.raw_text: This month we are seeking Board approval to award for the purchase of 250 over-the-road express diesel buses with options for up to 131 additional for a total of 381 buses

payload.claim_text: This month we are seeking Board approval to award for the purchase of 250 over-the-road express diesel buses with options for up to 131 additional for a total of 381 buses and related items.
payload.description: Diesel bus procurement to replace buses at end of 12-year useful life

tool_args.label: Transit Crime decreased 12% from August
tool_args.raw_text: Transit Crime, which decreased 12% from August.

payload.claim_text: Transit Crime, which decreased 12% from August.

tool_args.label: Commitment to 100% zero-emissions bus fleet by 2040
tool_args.raw_text: commitment to transition to 100% zero-emissions fleet by 2040

payload.claim_text: Another way Buses is committed to cleanliness, not just for their operations but for a healthier environment, is the commitment to transition to 100% zero-emissions fleet by 2040.

tool_args.label: Re-NEW-vation project timeline event
tool_args.raw_text: In October, the Department of Subways celebrated a major milestone as it completed its 50th Station Re-NEW-vation at Junction Blvd 7.

tool_args.label: 4 million customers new normal for Tue-Thu
tool_args.raw_text: 4 million customers, once a stretch goal, is now the new normal for Tuesday to Thursday ridership.

payload.claim_text: 4 million customers, once a stretch goal, is now the new normal for Tuesday to Thursday ridership.

tool_args.label: Bus ridership Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: overall bus ridership in September was about 1.4 million - 60% of pre-pandemic ridership

tool_args.label: Train Cleanliness satisfaction Sep 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Train Cleanliness increased four points to 62%

tool_args.label: Bus CJTP by Borough Sep 2023 - Systemwide
tool_args.raw_text: Systemwide average 68.0%

tool_args.label: F train speed improvement near Bergen Street
tool_args.raw_text: our SPEED unit remains hard at work, implementing speed improvements in August near Bergen Street that have reduced running times by about ten seconds for southbound F trains traveling between Jay Street and Bergen Street.

payload.location: between Jay Street and Bergen Street
payload.scenario: SPEED unit speed improvements near Bergen Street in August

scenario_normalized.raw_text: SPEED unit speed improvements near Bergen Street in August

location_normalized.raw_text: between Jay Street and Bergen Street

warnings: metric_claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids on metric payloads refer to route entities and should become explicit relations when supported. Suggested relation: route has_metric metric_claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Subway Pulse Survey Sep 2023 - Satisfied
tool_args.raw_text: Mode Month Very Satisfied Satisfied Dissatisfied Very Dissatisfied Subways S 12% 48% 30% 10%

payload.raw_value_text: S: 12% Very Satisfied, 48% Satisfied, 30% Dissatisfied, 10% Very Dissatisfied

tool_args.label: G line highest train cleanliness satisfaction
tool_args.raw_text: the G performing highest with 82% satisfaction and the B, N, and W seeing notable improvements of 8, 9, and 14% respectively.

payload.claim_text: the G performing highest with 82% satisfaction and the B, N, and W seeing notable improvements of 8, 9, and 14% respectively
payload.description: Subway line train cleanliness satisfaction scores

tool_args.label: 89 Subways employee facilities rehabilitated in 2023
tool_args.raw_text: 89 Subways employee facilities have been rehabilitated in 2023, with the departmental goal of 100 in reach.

payload.claim_text: 89 Subways employee facilities have been rehabilitated in 2023, with the departmental goal of 100 in reach.

tool_args.label: Department of Subways part of NYCT
tool_args.raw_text: At the Department of Subways, incredible work has been underway

tool_args.label: Department of Buses part of NYCT
tool_args.raw_text: The Department of Buses has multiple initiatives

tool_args.label: NYCT collaborates with NYPD
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT will continue to further efforts for a cleaner system by collaborating with the NYPD

tool_args.label: NYPA partners with NYCT on charging infrastructure
tool_args.raw_text: This is our first partnership with NYPA for changing infrastructure installation
